metadata_fields_captured: File mode: none beyond filename/title; MongoDB mode: source_type, language_code, dump_file
wa_ea_tagging_support: WA: implicit via language='hyw' and source selection; EA: no

retry_rate_limit_behavior: API retries up to 5 with exponential backoff (_RETRY_DELAY * 2^attempt, capped 30s); fixed 0.1s politeness delay between pages
output_format: Per-page .txt files by category; optional MongoDB documents
metadata_fields_captured: MongoDB mode: source_type, category, language_code, url; file mode: category path + title filename only
wa_ea_tagging_support: WA: yes (hardcoded language_code hyw in MongoDB metadata and WA-configured categories); EA: no

retry_rate_limit_behavior: No exponential retry; per-request exception handling; fixed 1.0s delay between API/download calls
output_format: catalog.json + downloaded _djvu.txt files under per-item directories
wa_ea_tagging_support: WA: optional classifier gate (apply_wa_filter using is_western_armenian); EA: no explicit support

output_format: No explicit HTTP retry/backoff in module; checkpoint resume support (.culturax_checkpoint.json)

endpoints: WA: optional classifier gate (apply_wa_filter); EA: no explicit EA tag (language typically hy)
column9: HuggingFace datasets hub via load_dataset(dataset_name, language, split='train', streaming=...)

retry_rate_limit_behavior: No explicit retry loops; fixed 2.0s delay between requests; sequential page probing until consecutive failures
metadata_fields_captured: catalog structure placeholder (search implementation currently yields empty catalog by default); downloaded volume text files carry minimal implicit metadata via filename
wa_ea_tagging_support: WA: optional classifier gate (apply_wa_filter); EA: no explicit support

transport: requests.Session (plus requests.get in file download helper)

output_format: loc_catalog.json; per-item text parts; combined per-item .txt
wa_ea_tagging_support: WA: optional classifier gate (apply_wa_filter); EA: no explicit support

transport: Selenium Chrome WebDriver + requests fallback + BeautifulSoup parsing

Per-prefix retries with exponential backoff (retry_base_delay * 2^attempt); cooldown/block detection; request delay 1.5s

retry_rate_limit_behavior: No generalized retry framework; per-call exception handling; fixed 2.0s politeness delays between articles/agencies
output_format: EA Wikipedia .txt + metadata JSONL; EA news .txt + per-agency metadata JSONL
